M-079.NAME: premium-email-templates
M-079.owns: Premium Matrix/cyberpunk Resend verification and password-reset email templates.
M-079.purpose: Bring transactional email visual quality in line with the premium KrotPN frontend without weakening token safety.

exports.template-premium-verification: Email verification HTML/text templates with logo, action button, security copy, and spam-safe structure.
exports.template-premium-reset: Password reset HTML/text templates with one-time token semantics and clear safety copy.
exports.rule-email-fallback: Readable text fallback without image URLs, raw tokens, or visual-only meaning.

constraints.constraint-1: Verification/reset tokens, provider keys, and full one-time URLs must never leak to logs or provider error details.
constraints.constraint-2: Email must remain usable when remote images are blocked by the mailbox client.
constraints.constraint-3: Template changes do not modify Resend deploy configuration or provider semantics.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: Backend email tests pass for verification and reset templates.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Phase-64 smoke proves logo URL, text fallback, token redaction, and dark-email compatibility markers.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: V-M-079 maps HTML/text/token/provider/logo/protected-surface gates before execution changes are made.
acceptance-metrics.metric-5: V-M-079 verifies the minimal-copy, larger-logo, no-top-strip, transparent-outer-background, CTA/fallback, token-redaction, and protected-surface gates for Phase-66 execution.

verification-design.target-1: Verification and password-reset templates must share a premium email shell without changing one-time token, pending registration, or password reset semantics.
verification-design.target-2: Text fallback must stay plain, readable, independent of remote images, and free of visual-only meaning.
verification-design.target-3: Body logo usage must rely on an approved public frontend asset URL and must not claim mailbox sender-avatar, BIMI provider, or DNS behavior.
verification-design.target-4: Phase-64 execution must not modify Resend installer wiring, EMAIL_FROM, provider credentials, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, VPN, or MTProto runtime behavior.
verification-design.target-5: Phase-66 must remove operator-specified verbose Matrix/access/security copy, the green top-strip, and opaque outer background while preserving CTA/fallback usability and token safety.

phase-66-plan.scope: Minimal verification/reset email polish: larger body logo, shorter content, no KrotPN Matrix Access label, no eyebrow/intro/support/footer noise, no #5cf2c8 card-edge strip, and transparent outer wrapper background.
phase-66-plan.protected-surfaces: Resend provider configuration, EMAIL_FROM, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, DNS/BIMI, frontend public/user/admin pages, auth token semantics, password policy, billing, VPN, and MTProto runtime remain out of scope.
phase-66-plan.verification-designed: backend/tests/test_email_delivery.py, scripts/phase64-premium-email-template-smoke.mjs, scripts/phase51-brand-assets-smoke.mjs, scripts/phase66-minimal-email-template-smoke.mjs, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected surface guard are the acceptance gates for Phase-66 execution.
phase-66-plan.execution-status: done-local: minimal templates are implemented with a 128px logo, no verbose operator-forbidden copy, no top strip, no #04090d outer background, preserved CTA/fallback links, and unchanged provider/deploy/runtime surfaces.

execution-evidence.local-2026-06-04: Premium verification/reset templates now share an email-client-safe Matrix shell, public email-logo body image, CTA button, compact fallback panel, plain text fallback, and required Phase-64 redaction/brand/protected-surface markers without changing Resend provider configuration or deploy/runtime surfaces.
execution-evidence.verification-2026-06-04: Passed: backend/tests/test_email_delivery.py 5/5, scripts/phase64-premium-email-template-smoke.mjs, scripts/phase51-brand-assets-smoke.mjs, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/provider/runtime/frontend guard.
execution-evidence.phase66-local-2026-06-04: Minimal verification/reset templates now remove the Phase-66 forbidden copy, render a 128px public body logo, keep the dark card/CTA/fallback links, and use no #04090d outer-wrapper background or #5cf2c8 top strip.

M-079.hotspot: H-066: Premium Resend templates must remain token-safe, text-fallback clean, and compatible with image-blocking email clients.
